readme: Evodocs are repo-local project understanding documents for coding agents. Start with .evodocs/index.json to identify the relevant project modules, then read the matching .evodocs/mod--<module>.md files, including parent, child, or neighboring module docs when a change crosses boundaries. Use those docs to understand responsibilities, flows, relationships, constraints, and known limits; inspect the actual code when more detail or verification is needed. Only after collecting enough context from the index, module docs, and necessary code should you analyze the project, design a plan, or modify code.
